use_cases: Displaying product features with animated demonstrations on landing pages
Showcasing typography and layout capabilities of a design system
Highlighting performance metrics like load time with animated indicators
Demonstrating responsive layout changes and grid morphing animations
Creating engaging feature comparison sections for SaaS products
ai_summary: A multi-part animated feature showcase component demonstrating product capabilities including typography scaling, grid layout morphing, and performance metrics. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations, it cycles through different layouts and states automatically. Designed for landing pages and feature demonstration sections where visual product capabilities need to be displayed interactively.
